steps.title: Identify the series structure
steps.content: The passage lists three films—one for each filmmaker—signaled by “respectively.” They form a coordinate series.

steps.title: Apply comma separation rule
steps.content:
Commas must separate items in a series of three. Choice D (1981), El Norte (1983), creates the proper structure: Zoot Suit (1981), El Norte (1983), and Stand and Deliver (1988).

The other choices either omit the comma after (1981) or use dashes instead.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
